start.speaker: Help
start.text: Steady, friend. I have pulled many from this hollow. Give me your hand; the mire has no bottom for the one determined to be his own savior.

choices.text: Please. I cannot save myself from this. Help me.
choices.text_zh: 求你。我无法自救脱离此地。帮我。

choices.text: Stand back. I got myself into this; I should climb out myself.
choices.text_zh: 退后。是我自己陷进来的；该我自己爬出去。

choices.text: Why is this place so deep? I thought obedience would feel cleaner than this.
choices.text_zh: 这地方为何这样深？我还以为顺服会比这更清爽些。

text_variants.text: I see despair has nearly closed over your head — all the more reason to take my hand. The mire has no bottom for the one determined to be his own savior, but it has a firm edge for the one who will be helped.
text_variants.text_zh: 我看见绝望几乎要没过你的头顶——这就更该拉住我的手。这泥沼对一心要自己作救主的人没有底，但对肯受帮助的人却有一道坚实的岸。

start.text_zh: 稳住，朋友。我从这洼里拉上来过许多人。把手给我；这泥沼对一心要自己作救主的人没有底。

warn.speaker: Help
warn.text: Look at your feet. Every proud push sinks you deeper. Mercy is not insulted when the helpless reach for it; mercy came here for that very reason.

choices.text: You are right. I am sinking. Help me, please.
choices.text_zh: 你说得对。我在下沉。求你帮我。

warn.text_zh: 看你的脚。每一次骄傲的挣扎都让你陷得更深。无助之人伸手求告，怜悯并不以为辱；怜悯正是为这缘故才来到这里。

explain.speaker: Help
explain.text: Warnings were given, and stones were laid. But fear and guilt drain into this hollow, and beginners often meet them before they know how to stand. This is not the end of you. It is the beginning learning to receive help.

choices.text: Then take my hand before despair teaches me to stop asking.
choices.text_zh: 那就趁绝望还没教我停止求告，拉住我的手。

explain.text_zh: 警告早已给过，踏脚石也曾铺下。但恐惧与愧疚都泄入这洼，初行的人往往还没学会站立就先撞上它们。这不是你的终局，而是学习接受帮助的开端。

pull.speaker: Help
pull.text: There. Solid stone under your feet again. Breathe. Remember this: repentance is not proving you can rise alone; it is consenting to be lifted. The gate is ahead. Go on.
pull.text_zh: 好了。脚下又是坚石了。喘口气。记住这个：悔改不是证明你能独自站起，而是甘愿被人扶起。门就在前头。走吧。
